---
title: "SWR — Box-Cox Transform"
subtitle: "Experiment exp_swr_boxcox"
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    geometry: margin=1in
    fontsize: 11pt
---

## Overview

SWR model with Box-Cox (λ=0.2) response transform on Big Sur daily streamflow.
Number of kernels K swept over K\in{{1,2,3,4}}, K selected by BIC\_eff on training data.

**Config:** m=20, ν=1.5, maxiter=202, seed=42, Gaussian kernel fixed, train: hydr\_year < 30, test: hydr\_year ≥ 30.

## Per-K Training Selection

| K | BIC\_eff | AIC\_eff | Train NSE | Train RMSE |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | 7650.4 | 8912.5 | 0.4657 | 3.5095 |
| 2 | 7401.9 | 8990.1 | 0.4321 | 3.6181 |
| 3 | 2369.3 | 5248.4 | 0.6727 | 2.7470 |
| 4 \* | -2082.7 | 1906.2 | 0.6987 | 2.6353 |

(\* = selected model.)

## Test Performance (Best K=4)

Best model parameters: θ = (0.3660, 19.8308, 1.5000, 0.0407)

| Mode | CRPS | NSE | RMSE | MAE |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| sim | 0.5260 | 0.7681 | 2.0333 | 0.7684 |
| krig | 0.3092 | 0.8925 | 1.3845 | 0.2723 |

## Kernel Shapes (Best Model)

![Fitted kernel shapes](plots/kernel_shapes.png){width=60%}

## Calibration

![PIT histogram — simulation](plots/pit_hist_sim_test.png){width=45%}
![PIT histogram — kriging](plots/pit_hist_krig_test.png){width=45%}

![QQ plot (RQR) — simulation](plots/qq_rqr_sim_test.png){width=45%}
![QQ plot (RQR) — kriging](plots/qq_rqr_krig_test.png){width=45%}

## Time Series (Best Model)

![Test period time series — kriging](plots/timeseries_krig_test.png){width=90%}

![Test period time series (zoom) — kriging](plots/timeseries_zoom_krig_test.png){width=90%}
